summary: Added the first real-data surface raster overlay path for /cosmos-review: a local NASA GIBS global true-color atlas loader, WMS global snapshot fetch script, planet shader blending, runtime status panel, art-direction controls, and tests. The sandbox could not download the live image due DNS failure, but the local Codex workflow can fetch the atlas into public/cosmos/gibs and the renderer will consume it automatically.
known_limits: No live GIBS raster was downloaded in this environment because gibs.earthdata.nasa.gov failed DNS resolution.
The overlay currently targets a global WMS true-color surface atlas, not full time-dynamic cloud/weather ingestion.
The true-color GIBS source includes clouds; the shader includes a first-pass bright low-chroma cloud moderation heuristic, but lead-eyes screenshot review is needed.
Underwater and shallow-water realism still need bathymetry/depth textures.
next_recommended_patch: R-0005: local real-data screenshot review plus bathymetry/depth raster interface.
